bird.name: 西凤头黄眉企鹅
bird.summary: 西凤头黄眉企鹅（台湾作西方長冠企鵝，学名：Eudyptes moseleyi），是企鹅目企鹅科的一种鸟类。 西凤头黄眉企鹅体重约2327.85克，翼长约102.2毫米，嘴峰长约53.4毫米，喙宽度约14毫米，喙厚度约20.4毫米，跗蹠长约34.8毫米，尾长约62.4毫米。西凤头…

locations.name: 柏林動物園
locations.summary: 柏林動物園（德語：Zoologischer Garten Berlin，發音：[tsoːoˌloːɡɪʃɐ ˈɡaʁtn̩ bɛʁˈliːn] ）是德國柏林的一個動物園，也是現存最古老的且最知名的動物園。 历史 建於1844年，佔地35公…

locations.name: 印度洋
locations.summary: 印度洋（英語：Indian Ocean），位于亚洲、非洲、大洋洲和南极洲之间，印度位在印度洋北部的中央位置，這也是印度洋名稱的由來，印度洋大部分在南半球。總面积7491万平方公里，约占世界海洋总面积的21.1%，是世界第三大洋。印度洋的範…

locations.name: 大西洋
locations.summary: 大西洋，即亚特兰蒂斯洋（英語：Atlantic Ocean），是世界第二大洋。原面積8221萬7千平方公里，在南冰洋確立後，面積調整為7676萬2千平方公里。平均深度3,646米，最深處波多黎各海沟深達8,605米。從赤道南北分為北大西洋…

relations.evidence: The northern rockhopper penguin (Eudyptes moseleyi), also known as Moseley's rockhopper penguin, Moseley's penguin, or Tristan penguin, is a penguin species native to the southern Indian and Atlantic Oceans

relations.subject: 西凤头黄眉企鹅
relations.evidence: Retrieved 18 March 2009. A study published in 2009 showed that the world population of the northern rockhopper had declined by 90% since the 1950s, possibly because of climate change, changes in marine ecosystems and overfishing for squid and octopus by humans.[http://www.birdlife.org/news/news/2009/01/rockhopper_decline.html BirdLife International
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

relations.subject: 西凤头黄眉企鹅
relations.evidence: Retrieved 16 January 2009. Other possible factors in the decline include disturbance and pollution from ecotourism and fishing, egg-harvesting, and predation and competition from subantarctic fur seals (Arctophoca tropicalis). Surveys show that the birds are at risk of infection by goose barnacles. House mice (Mus musculus) have been introduced into their environment by human sea expeditions
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

Surveys show that the birds are at risk of infection by goose barnacles. House mice (Mus musculus) have been introduced into their environment by human sea expeditions
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
